message:
test(sharing): add unit tests for share link store with PBKDF2 auth

20 tests covering: link creation with unique codes, password hashing,
lookup by code, list with user/active filters, revocation, view count
tracking, PBKDF2 password verification (correct/incorrect/unique
salts/null hash), and settings updates (add/remove password).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
